Contact Us

Have a question, found a bug, or want to suggest a new feature? We would love to hear from you. Our team typically responds within 24–48 hours during business days.

Send Us a Message

Common Support Topics

Before reaching out, check if your question is covered below:

How to use a tool

Each tool has a simple drag-and-drop interface. Upload your PDF, make changes, and download the result. Check our blog guides for detailed step-by-step instructions.

Reporting a bug

If a tool is not working correctly, please include the browser you are using (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, etc.), the tool name, and a description of the issue. Screenshots are helpful.

Suggesting a feature

We are always looking for new tools and improvements. Tell us what PDF operation you need and we will evaluate it for our roadmap.

Privacy and security

All tools process files 100% in your browser. Your files are never uploaded to any server. Read our Privacy Policy for full details.

Prefer email? Reach us directly at hello@tinypdftools.com

© 2026 Tiny PDF Tools. 100% Client-Side Privacy.
